import functools

class DataProcessor:
    def __init__(self, config):
        self.config = config
        self._results = []

    @functools.lru_cache(maxsize=128)
    def get_schema(self, table_name):
        return self._fetch_schema_from_db(table_name)

    @functools.lru_cache(maxsize=64)
    def compute_hash(self, data_block):
        return hashlib.sha256(data_block.encode()).hexdigest()

    @functools.lru_cache(maxsize=32)
    def get_user_permissions(self, user_id):
        return self._query_permissions(user_id)

    def _fetch_schema_from_db(self, table_name):
        return {"table": table_name, "columns": []}

    def _query_permissions(self, user_id):
        return ["read", "write"]
